# AgelessLabs.ai

> AI-powered longevity biomarker analysis. Understand what your lab results reveal about how long you'll live.

AgelessLabs.ai is a longevity-focused platform that interprets blood test results through a longevity lens. The site combines a free AI biomarker analysis tool with a growing library of evidence-based reference content on longevity biomarkers, lab testing, and healthspan optimization.

## What this site covers

- **AI Biomarker Interpreter** — free tool at /analyze. Users upload or paste lab results; the AI returns a longevity score (0–100), per-marker status (optimal / monitor / concern), narrative summary, and prioritized recommendations.
- **Biomarker Reference Library** — /biomarkers/ — one page per biomarker covering definition, why it matters for longevity, standard vs. longevity-optimal ranges, interventions, and testing options.
- **Lab Test Guides** — comparisons and buyer's guides for lab testing services including InsideTracker, Function Health, Ulta Lab Tests, SiPhox Health, Marek Health, and Mito Health.
- **Protocol Guides** — optimization guides for metabolic health, cardiovascular health, hormonal health, inflammation, and nutrient status.
- **Longevity Explainers** — guides on reading lab results, understanding reference ranges, and interpreting common panels.

## Audience

Health-conscious adults aged 35–65 who track biomarkers and are focused on longevity optimization.

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://agelesslabs.ai/
- AI tool: https://agelesslabs.ai/analyze
- Biomarker index: https://agelesslabs.ai/biomarkers/
- About: https://agelesslabs.ai/about
- Sitemap: https://agelesslabs.ai/sitemap.xml

## Content standards

All biomarker content includes longevity-optimized reference ranges, citations to primary research (PubMed, clinical guidelines), and a named medical reviewer. Content is written for informational purposes only and is not medical advice.

## Contact

General: hello@agelesslabs.ai
Privacy: privacy@agelesslabs.ai
Legal: legal@agelesslabs.ai
